## Verification Checklist

<!-- Before raising a fix, verify that a fix is actually needed -->

- [ ] Reproduced the issue locally (storybook / test / screenshot)
- [ ] Confirmed this is a Blade bug, not a consumer usage issue (e.g. wrong prop passed)
- [ ] Checked existing stories/tests to see if the "bug" is actually expected behaviour

## Component Checklist

<!-- Ensure that the following tasks are completed before submitting your PR. Tick the applicable boxes -->

- [ ] Update Component Status Page
- [ ] Perform Manual Testing in Other Browsers
- [ ] Add KitchenSink Story
- [ ] Add Interaction Tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Add changeset
